raw.subject: Your Wilmington page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I saw that you're regularly sharing your schedule with your customers, and I love how easy it is for everyone to plan ahead.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on direct bookings and calls when people are looking for a quick answer.

I took a look at your Facebook feed and sketched out a homepage idea that incorporates your menu hero, hours block, and some of your great photos. Here's what I came up with:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/2-bros-coastal-cuisine-food-truck-wilmington

If you're interested in building out a simple site like this for your business, I'd be happy to discuss the details and provide a quote. Just reply or give me a quick call to get started.
